target_audience: Android users seeking caller ID and spam protection
main_angle: Protect yourself from unwanted calls while enhancing your contact management
top_benefits: Identify and block spam calls in real-time
Discover who saved your number and how
Enjoy a powerful T9 dialer and intuitive call log
faq_topics: How does the spam blocking feature work?
Can I see who saved my number?
What are the privacy controls available?

style_guide.template_objective: To provide a clean and user-friendly layout that emphasizes the app's features and benefits.
